title: Glowing Trims Mod
description: Glowing Trims adds permanent glow to armor trims.
body:
# Glowing Trims

All armor trims glow constantly pure visual radiance.

## 📖 What's this mod?

Ever wanted your armor to always look enchanted, without the enchantment glint? Now it does.

Glowing Trims adds a permanent glow effect to all armor trim patterns. Your armor always stands out, day or night.

## ✅ Features

- Permanent glow on all armor trims.
- Works on players and armor stands.
- No dependencies, no configuration needed.
- Client-side only.

## ❓ Usage

Install in your Fabric mods folder. That's it.

## 🔥 Requirements

* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

[![Dynamic Trims Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be86f861517ee0262d8fb08aa0b9fa356ddf1892.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-trims-mod)
